steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to request refund of EUR 3,093.75 overpayment on DBK dividend payment for account 801234567
Provide documentation showing DE-NO tax treaty rate of 26.375% applies, resulting in correct withholding of EUR 59,343.75 vs. EUR 56,250 withheld
If custodian cannot process refund directly, file claim with BZSt using electronic refund procedure for investment income under Section 32(6) KStG

references.title: BZSt – Capital Yield Tax Relief / Refund Procedures
